landing.hero: Turn Any Topic Into a Science Animation
landing.subtitle: Upload a reference video, enter a new topic, and our 13-step AI pipeline will generate a complete science animation with voiceover, visuals, and subtitles.
landing.step1Desc: Upload a science animation video or paste a URL. Our AI extracts the style DNA — visuals, narrative structure, tone, and pacing.
landing.step2Desc: Provide your desired topic. AI researches, scripts, and storyboards the entire video automatically.
landing.step3Desc: Watch as our pipeline generates keyframes, animates scenes, adds voiceover, and assembles the final video with subtitles.

auth.loginDesc: Enter your credentials to access your account
auth.registerDesc: Get started with AI-powered science video generation

dashboard.title: Projects
dashboard.subtitle: Manage your science video projects
dashboard.noProjectsDesc: Create your first AI science video project by uploading a reference video and providing a topic.

project.referenceDesc: Upload a science animation video or paste a URL. This video's style will be used as reference.
project.topicDesc: What science topic should the new video cover?
project.configureDesc: Set video duration, quality, and language preferences.

settings.title: Settings
settings.apiKeysDesc: Configure API keys for AI providers. At minimum, a Google AI key is required.
settings.capabilityMatrixDesc: Available capabilities based on your configured API keys.
